name: playwright-api-bdd-framework
description: Playwright API Testing Framework with BDD

scripts.check:quality: npm run bdd:generate && npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.check:quality:generated: npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.test:api:live:smoke: cross-env ENV=dev TEST_LANE=api-live-smoke RETRY_API_LIVE=0 playwright test --project "API Tests - Chromium" --grep "(?=.*@api)(?=.*@smoke)" --grep-invert=@mock
scripts.test:api:live:smoke:ci: cross-env ENV=dev TEST_LANE=api-live-smoke RETRY_API_LIVE=0 playwright test --project "API Tests - Chromium" --grep "(?=.*@api)(?=.*@smoke)" --grep-invert=@mock --workers=3
scripts.test:api:live:regression: cross-env ENV=dev TEST_LANE=api-live-regression RETRY_API_LIVE=0 playwright test --project "API Tests - Chromium" --grep "(?=.*@api)(?=.*@regression)" --grep-invert=@mock
scripts.test:api:mock: cross-env ENV=dev TEST_LANE=api-mock API_MOCK_ENABLED=true API_MOCK_PROFILE=contract-default RETRY_API_MOCK=0 playwright test --project "API Tests - Chromium" --grep "(?=.*@api)(?=.*@mock)"
scripts.test:api:mock:ci: cross-env ENV=dev TEST_LANE=api-mock API_MOCK_ENABLED=true API_MOCK_PROFILE=contract-default RETRY_API_MOCK=0 playwright test --project "API Tests - Chromium" --grep "(?=.*@api)(?=.*@mock)" --workers=2
scripts.test:ui:smoke: cross-env ENV=dev TEST_LANE=ui-critical RETRY_UI_CRITICAL=1 playwright test --project "UI Tests - Chromium" --grep "(?=.*@ui)(?=.*@smoke)" --grep-invert=@regression
scripts.test:ui:critical: cross-env ENV=dev TEST_LANE=ui-critical RETRY_UI_CRITICAL=1 playwright test --project "UI Tests - Chromium" --grep "(?=.*@ui)(?=.*@critical)"
scripts.test:ui:critical:ci: cross-env ENV=dev TEST_LANE=ui-critical RETRY_UI_CRITICAL=1 playwright test --project "UI Tests - Chromium" --grep "(?=.*@ui)(?=.*@critical)" --workers=2
scripts.test:ui:regression: cross-env ENV=dev TEST_LANE=ui-regression RETRY_UI_REGRESSION=1 playwright test --project "UI Tests - Chromium" --grep "(?=.*@ui)(?=.*@regression)"
scripts.test:ui:register:fast: cross-env ENV=dev playwright test --project "UI Tests - Chromium" --grep=@register --workers=75%
scripts.test:ui:fast: cross-env ENV=dev playwright test --project "UI Tests - Chromium" --grep=@ui --workers=75%
scripts.test:ui:smoke:fast: cross-env ENV=dev TEST_LANE=ui-critical RETRY_UI_CRITICAL=1 playwright test --project "UI Tests - Chromium" --grep "(?=.*@ui)(?=.*@smoke)" --grep-invert=@regression --workers=75%
scripts.test:ui:smoke:ci: cross-env ENV=dev TEST_LANE=ui-critical RETRY_UI_CRITICAL=1 playwright test --project "UI Tests - Chromium" --grep "(?=.*@ui)(?=.*@smoke)" --grep-invert=@regression --workers=3
scripts.perf:smoke: npm run perf:prepare && npm run perf:archive:smoke && cross-env ENV=dev artillery run perf/scenarios/api.smoke.yml -o out/perf/api-smoke.json
scripts.perf:load: npm run perf:prepare && npm run perf:archive:load && cross-env ENV=dev artillery run perf/scenarios/api.load.yml -o out/perf/api-load.json
scripts.perf:ui: npm run perf:prepare && npm run perf:archive:ui && cross-env ENV=dev artillery run perf/scenarios/ui.critical.yml -o out/perf/ui-critical.json
scripts.perf:report:smoke: npm run perf:prepare && node perf/reporters/generate-report.js --input out/perf/api-smoke.json --output out/perf/api-smoke.html --title "API Smoke Performance Report"
scripts.perf:report:load: npm run perf:prepare && node perf/reporters/generate-report.js --input out/perf/api-load.json --output out/perf/api-load.html --title "API Load Performance Report"
scripts.perf:report:ui: npm run perf:prepare && node perf/reporters/generate-report.js --input out/perf/ui-critical.json --output out/perf/ui-critical.html --title "UI Critical Performance Report"
scripts.report:allure:history:prepare: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const src='out/allure-report/history'; const dst='out/allure-results/history'; if (fs.existsSync(src)) fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});"
scripts.report:allure:generate: npm run report:allure:history:prepare && rimraf out/allure-report && allure generate out/allure-results -o out/allure-report
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && rimraf node_modules package-lock.json
